title: Cyber-Forensics Behavioral Analysis System
description: A concept-based platform that introduces an intent-focused evaluation model to analyze malicious behavior patterns instead of only tracking visible actions.
longDescription: Designed a concept-based cyber-forensics platform that introduces an **intent-focused evaluation model** to analyze malicious behavior patterns instead of only tracking visible actions. The project emphasizes investigative logic, behavioral analysis, and system-level security thinking. It reflects my ability to approach problems Systems-first, not tool-first.

title: Automation Workflows & API Systems
description: Built automation pipelines integrating APIs and cloud tools to handle real-world issues like connection failures, retries, and data flow reliability.
longDescription: Built automation pipelines integrating APIs and cloud tools using workflow automation platforms. Worked on handling real-world issues like connection failures, retries, and data flow reliability. This gave me practical exposure to backend logic, distributed system behavior, and fault handling.

title: Self-Hosting & Infrastructure Exploration
description: Exploration of local servers, service exposure, networking configurations, and deployment debugging.
longDescription: Worked with local servers, service exposure, networking configurations, and deployment debugging. Explored how services run in isolated environments and how networking affects system behavior. This built a DevOps-style understanding beyond just application development.

title: Digital Systems Design (VLSI Track)
description: Designed and simulated digital circuits such as multiplexers, full adders, and full subtractors using Verilog.
longDescription: Designed and simulated digital circuits such as multiplexers, full adders, and full subtractors using **Verilog** and testbenches. Strengthened my understanding of structured logic design and hardware-level problem solving, which influences how I design software systems.

title: Hackathon Experience (ML/Data Theme)
description: Participated in a machine learning and data-oriented hackathon environment, contributing to technical structuring and problem-solving.
longDescription: Participated in a machine learning and data-oriented hackathon environment, contributing to technical structuring and problem-solving under time constraints. Improved collaboration, adaptability, and fast decision-making in team-based technical settings.
